name: Add Band Power Widget to OpenBCI GUI
description: The OpenBCI GUI is running an active Synthetic EEG session with a multi-panel layout. Configure one of the widget panels to display the Band Power widget, which visualizes relative power across the classic EEG frequency bands: Delta (0.5-4 Hz), Theta (4-8 Hz), Alpha (8-12 Hz), Beta (12-30 Hz), and Gamma (30-100 Hz).
